title: docs: update release process for GitHub Actions
body:
Replace outdated Cirrus CI instructions in `RELEASE_PROCESS.md` with the current GitHub Actions workflows.

This updates release validation, Podman Machine OS image publishing, workflow monitoring, and removes obsolete Cirrus cron instructions.

Fixes #28950

comments.body:
Thanks for the review guys!

I updated the PR with the suggested changes
Thanks for the update! Changes LGTM, but please squash your commits into one.
